subcodes.first_line: O thou who clingest to the firm cord! Tarry not in this world of color and fragrance, but set thy sights and hasten onward [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متمسک بعروه وثقی در این جهان پر بو و رنگ درنگ مکن و آهنگ
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @nearness and remoteness, @transcending the material condition, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @idle fancies; lust and passion
